measure.title: Body Measurement
measure.initModelDesc: Our AI runs locally in your browser — no data is uploaded
measure.uploadHintSmall: JPG, PNG — front-facing full body works best

measure.tipsTightClothingDesc: Wear fitted clothes for accurate results
measure.statusInitAi: Initialize the AI model to start measuring
measure.statusLoadingAi: Loading AI model — this takes a few seconds...

measure.statusComplete: ✅ Measurement complete! Review your results below.
measure.statusNoPose: ⚠️ Could not detect pose. Please upload a clear full-body front photo.
measure.statusError: ❌ Error analyzing photo. Please try again.
measure.statusSaved: ✅ Measurement saved! View it in your History.
